qwen_omni_config.message0: 配置通义千问API %1 API Key %2 %3 Base URL %4
qwen_omni_config.tooltip: 配置通义千问API的访问密钥和基础URL

qwen_omni_chat.message0: 通义千问对话 %1 用户消息 %2 %3 模型 %4
qwen_omni_chat.tooltip: 发送消息到通义千问并获取回复

qwen_omni_chat_simple.message0: 通义千问对话(简易) %1 用户消息 %2
qwen_omni_chat_simple.tooltip: 使用默认模型(qwen-turbo)发送消息

qwen_omni_chat_with_thinking.message0: 通义千问深度思考对话 %1 用户消息 %2 %3 模型 %4
qwen_omni_chat_with_thinking.tooltip: 启用深度思考模式的通义千问对话

qwen_omni_chat_with_history.message0: 通义千问多轮对话 %1 用户消息 %2 %3 模型 %4
qwen_omni_chat_with_history.tooltip: 支持多轮对话的通义千问，自动保存对话历史

qwen_omni_clear_history.message0: 清空通义千问对话历史
qwen_omni_clear_history.tooltip: 清空保存的对话历史记录

qwen_omni_set_system_prompt.message0: 设置通义千问系统提示词 %1 系统提示词 %2
qwen_omni_set_system_prompt.tooltip: 设置AI助手的角色和行为规则

qwen_omni_get_response_status.message0: 获取通义千问响应状态
qwen_omni_get_response_status.tooltip: 检查最后一次API调用是否成功

qwen_omni_get_error_message.message0: 获取通义千问错误信息
qwen_omni_get_error_message.tooltip: 获取最后一次API调用的错误信息

qwen_omni_set_stream_callback.message0: 设置通义千问流式回调 %1 %2
qwen_omni_set_stream_callback.tooltip: 设置流式回调函数，每收到一个文本片段时执行。使用'获取流式片段'块获取当前片段内容

qwen_omni_get_stream_chunk.message0: 获取通义千问流式片段
qwen_omni_get_stream_chunk.tooltip: 在流式回调中获取当前收到的文本片段

qwen_omni_clear_stream_callback.message0: 清除通义千问流式回调
qwen_omni_clear_stream_callback.tooltip: 清除已设置的流式回调函数

qwen_omni_vision_chat.message0: 通义千问图片对话 %1 Base64图片 %2 %3 提示词 %4 %5 模型 %6
qwen_omni_vision_chat.tooltip: 发送Base64编码的图片和文本到通义千问VL模型进行图片理解

qwen_omni_vision_chat_direct_capture.message0: 通义千问图片对话(直接拍照) %1 提示词 %2 %3 模型 %4
qwen_omni_vision_chat_direct_capture.tooltip: 直接从摄像头拍照并流式上传到通义千问VL（不生成完整Base64字符串，降低内存占用）

qwen_omni_vision_url_chat.message0: 通义千问图片URL对话 %1 图片URL %2 %3 提示词 %4 %5 模型 %6
qwen_omni_vision_url_chat.tooltip: 发送图片URL和文本到通义千问VL模型进行图片理解

qwen_omni_image_generate.message0: 通义万相生成图片 %1 提示词 %2 %3 模型 %4 %5 尺寸 %6
qwen_omni_image_generate.tooltip: 根据文字描述生成图片，返回图片URL链接，可配合TFT屏幕显示

qwen_omni_image_generate_simple.message0: 通义万相生成图片(简易) %1 提示词 %2
qwen_omni_image_generate_simple.tooltip: 根据文字描述生成图片，使用默认设置，返回图片URL链接，可配合TFT屏幕显示

qwen_omni_tts.message0: Qwen TTS %1 Text %2 %3 Voice %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Language %8
qwen_omni_tts.tooltip: Synthesize speech using Qwen TTS model, returns Base64-encoded PCM audio (24kHz 16bit mono)

qwen_omni_tts_play.message0: Qwen TTS Play Audio %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Base64 Audio %4
qwen_omni_tts_play.tooltip: Decode Base64 audio data from Qwen TTS and play via I2S (24kHz 16bit mono)

qwen_omni_tts_and_play.message0: Qwen TTS Synthesize & Play %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice %6 %7 Model %8 %9 Language %10
qwen_omni_tts_and_play.tooltip: Synthesize speech with Qwen TTS and play via I2S. Collects full audio then plays for stable quality

qwen_omni_tts_stream_play.message0: Qwen TTS Stream & Play %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice %6 %7 Model %8 %9 Language %10
qwen_omni_tts_stream_play.tooltip: Stream TTS synthesis with Qwen and play via I2S in real-time. Lower latency, continuous smooth audio

qwen_omni_omni_text.message0: Qwen Omni Chat (Text Only) %1 Message %2 %3 Model %4
qwen_omni_omni_text.tooltip: Chat with Qwen Omni model, returns text reply only

qwen_omni_omni_and_play.message0: Qwen Omni Chat & Play %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Message %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Voice %8
qwen_omni_omni_and_play.tooltip: Omni dialog returns text and audio, audio played via I2S after streaming completes

qwen_omni_omni_stream_play.message0: Qwen Omni Stream & Play %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Message %4 %5 Model %6 %7 Voice %8
qwen_omni_omni_stream_play.tooltip: Omni streaming dialog, text output in real-time, audio collected and played via I2S. Lower latency

qwen_omni_omni_get_audio.tooltip: Get Base64 audio data returned by Omni dialog (use after Omni dialog)

qwen_omni_tts_voice_design.message0: Qwen TTS Voice Design %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Text %4 %5 Voice Description %6
qwen_omni_tts_voice_design.tooltip: Custom voice by text description and synthesize. e.g. gentle young female voice, slightly fast

qwen_omni_omni_voice_chat.message0: Qwen Omni Voice Chat %1 I2S Object %2 %3 Record %4 s %5 Model %6 Voice %7 %8 Prompt (optional) %9
qwen_omni_omni_voice_chat.tooltip: Record from I2S microphone, send to Qwen Omni API, play voice response. Recording format: 24kHz 16bit mono
